title: ManagementTeamEnvelope
description: Canonical message envelope for inter-agent communication. Every message exchanged between Concierge, Commissioner, Overseer, and Knowledge MUST conform to this schema. Any receiver that receives an envelope missing required fields MUST respond with a NACK.

schema_version.description: Protocol schema version. Bump to 2.0 only on breaking changes.

message_id.description: UUID v4. Unique across all messages in all runs.

run_id.description: The run this message belongs to. Must match the run_id under which Overseer is tracking state.

message_type.description: Determines which payload schema applies. Receiver MUST reject unknown types with NACK.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the message was created.

correlation_id.description: UUID v4. A response message copies the correlation_id of the message it is responding to. New requests generate a fresh UUID.

payload.description: Message-type-specific payload. Validated against the schema file matching message_type.

Role.description: An allowed management team agent role.
